rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the scope problem with placeholder ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup and premature IsUnipotent, but Review 2 also flags that AffineAlgGroup bundles smoothness/reducedness into the foundational class, which would materially affect the shape of later PRs if the roadmap wants non-smooth examples kept in scope. I can confirm the bundling and True placeholders from the diff, though the roadmap-specific directive itself is not shown here.
